description: Correct three metadata errors in your Zotero library, which contains 18 papers with corrupted data. For 'On the Electrodynamics of Moving Bodies' by Albert Einstein, change the Date from '1095' to '1905'. For 'Deep Learning' by LeCun, Bengio, and Hinton, add the DOI '10.1038/nature14539'. For 'Computing Machinery and Intelligence' by Alan Turing, correct the Publication name from 'Mnd' to 'Mind'.
